title: VIZA Chatbot v2 - Persistent Visa-Aware AI Assistant

userStories.title: Render deployment config
userStories.description: Create render.yaml at viza-be/agent-backend/. Service name: viza-agent-backend, region: singapore, plan: free, buildCommand: npm install && npm run build, startCommand: npm start, healthCheckPath: /health. Env vars: NODE_ENV=production, PORT=10000, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY/SUPABASE_URL/SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY/CORS_ORIGINS all sync: false. Fix hardcoded GCP URL in companion-chat.tsx: change fallback from https://agent-backend-staging-kxvsjusria-as.a.run.app to http://localhost:3002. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_AGENT_BACKEND_URL to viza-fe/internal-website/.env.example.

userStories.title: Persistent single session - backend
userStories.description: Migration 0008_user_chat_sessions.sql: CREATE TABLE user_chat_sessions (id UUID PK, auth_user_id UUID UNIQUE NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users, visa_package_id UUID REFERENCES visa_packages, created_at/updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ). RLS: authenticated users read own row, service_role full access. Also: ALTER TABLE visa_chat_messages ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS block_data JSONB. Add Drizzle schema entries for userChatSessions. Add getOrCreateUserSession(userId) server action in companion-sessions.ts: upsert on auth_user_id unique constraint, return session + last 100 messages ordered by created_at asc.

userStories.title: Persistent single session - frontend
userStories.description: Update ChatPage (app/client/chat/page.tsx): call getOrCreateUserSession(userId) instead of getUserSessions. Pass single session + messages to ChatClient. Update CompanionChat (companion-chat.tsx): remove sessions state array, setSessions, handleSessionSelect, handleNewLabsAiChat, handleNewCareTeamChat. Remove SessionSidebar component entirely - delete the desktop sidebar div and the Sheet mobile sidebar. Chat fills full width. On mount: use the single session from props. Remove new conversation button. Keep all chat functionality (send, receive, scroll, streaming).

userStories.title: Visa-type-aware agent + application context
userStories.description: In agent/index.ts: add buildSystemPrompt(context: { visaPackage: {name, country, visa_type} | null, applicationSummary: string }): string. Visa-specific system prompt, agent is VIZA AI concierge, tells user to use send_application_block tool when missing fields. Add buildApplicationContext(userId: string): Promise<string> - queries applicant_profiles, applications, application_documents, user_packages+visa_packages via Supabase service role client. Returns formatted summary string showing COMPLETE/INCOMPLETE per section with MISSING fields listed. In visa-namespace.ts: on each visa_chat_message, fetch visaPackage + call buildApplicationContext(userId), call buildSystemPrompt, inject as system prompt to streamChat. Replace hardcoded SYSTEM_PROMPT.

userStories.title: Agent tool use - send_application_block tool
userStories.description: In agent/index.ts: add Anthropic tool definition for send_application_block. Tool input schema: title (string), description (string), blockType (enum: field_group|single_field|document_upload), fields (array of {key, label, type: text|date|select|textarea|file, required, currentValue, options?, placeholder?}), saveTarget (string: personal_info|passport_info|travel_info|visa_answer_{field}|document_{type}), applicationId (string|null). Update streamChat to use tools parameter. When tool_use block detected in stream: emit application_block socket event to user room with block data + generated messageId. Save to visa_chat_messages with role='block', content=description, block_data=full block JSON. Then emit tool_result back to continue the agent stream so agent acknowledges the block naturally.

userStories.title: BlockMessage frontend component
userStories.description: Create block-message.tsx in components/client/companion/. Props: { block: ApplicationBlock, onSaved: (blockId: string) => void }. ApplicationBlock type: {messageId, blockType, title, description, fields: Array<{key,label,type,required,currentValue,options?,placeholder?}>, saveTarget, applicationId}. Renders as white card with subtle border. Field types: text->Input, date->date input, select->Select, file->file input. Save button calls POST /api/chat/save-block with {userId, applicationId, saveTarget, values}. States: idle (editable), saving (spinner), saved (green border + checkmark, read-only), error (red + retry). On saved: emit block_saved socket event {blockId, saveTarget, savedValues}, call onSaved prop. Update use-agent-socket.ts: handle application_block socket event, add to messages array with role=block. Update companion-chat.tsx message rendering: when msg.role===block, parse msg.content or block_data and render <BlockMessage>.

userStories.title: Save-block API endpoint
userStories.description: Create viza-be/agent-backend/src/routes/chat-save-block.routes.ts. POST /save-block endpoint. Request: {userId, applicationId, saveTarget, values: Record<string,string>}. Routing: saveTarget===personal_info -> upsert applicant_profiles by auth_user_id (full_name, date_of_birth, gender, nationality, occupation, address, place_of_birth). saveTarget===passport_info -> upsert applicant_profiles (passport_number, passport_issue_date, passport_expiry_date, passport_issuing_country, passport_issuing_authority). saveTarget===travel_info -> upsert applications by id=applicationId (arrival_date, departure_date, port_of_entry, purpose, accommodation_name, accommodation_address). saveTarget starts with visa_answer_ -> upsert visa_application_answers (application_id, field_name=saveTarget.replace('visa_answer_',''), value_text). saveTarget starts with document_ -> insert application_documents (application_id, document_type=saveTarget.replace('document_',''), status='pending'). Response: {success: true, updatedFields: string[]}. Register in app.ts: app.use('/api/chat', chatSaveBlockRouter).

userStories.title: Realtime sync on /application page
userStories.description: In app/client/application/page.tsx, add useEffect that creates Supabase Realtime channel subscribed to postgres_changes on applicant_profiles (UPDATE) and applications (UPDATE). On any change event, call loadData() to refresh step data. Clean up channel on unmount. This ensures when the chat saves a block (e.g. travel info), the /application page auto-updates without a full reload.

userStories.title: Free step navigation on /application
userStories.description: In application/page.tsx: make all steps freely clickable. In VerticalStepSidebar: add onStepClick prop, wrap each step card in a button onClick={()=>onStepClick(i)}, remove locked styling/cursor-not-allowed. In MobileStepBar: same, make each step circle clickable. Remove LockedStepCard component entirely. In step rendering logic: remove the check that returns LockedStepCard when i > completedUpTo. Keep completedUpTo only for showing CompletedStepSummary (green card with Edit) when i < completedUpTo, vs full form when i >= completedUpTo. Any step can be navigated to freely by clicking sidebar or mobile bar.
